Extras

Add-Ons & Recommendations

Enhance your platform with additional tools and services that help your channel look polished and launch successfully.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="1_2" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Thumbnails & Show Artwork

Starting at our rates per show

Includes custom video thumbnails, show artwork, episode artwork, and featured images designed for your platform.

Thumbnails are strongly recommended to achieve the intended studio-style layout. Without thumbnails, the visual presentation may be simplified.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

Social Media Graphics Package

Starting at industry standard rates

Includes professionally designed website headers, profile images, cover images, and promotional graphics so your brand looks consistent across platforms.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_column type="4_4" module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"][et_pb_text module_class="msc-glass-card" _builder_version="4.27.6" _module_preset="default" theme_builder_area="post_content"]

We also recommend

  • Domain name
  • Hosting
  • Video hosting
  • Professional video player
  • Audio setup
[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
